steps.title: Apply Text 1's pattern
steps.content: Text 1 says literary scholars tend to neglect food writing, and cookbooks receive the least attention, especially regional US cookbooks. It also says this neglect happens regardless of quality.

steps.title: Explain Carter's neglect
steps.content: A blames popularity in general, which Text 1 does not. C says memoir material justifies neglect, which Text 1 does not imply. D blames marketing, which is not discussed. Carter's overlooked regional cookbook fits Text 1's pattern. The answer is B.
